---
title: "Jenny Höglauer"
image: images/jenny1.JPG
about:
  template: trestles
  links:
    - icon: github
      text: GitHub
      href: https://github.com/JennyHoeglauer
    - icon: envelope
      text: Email
      href: mailto:jenny.hoeglauer@outlook.com
---

## Hi, I'm Jenny Höglauer

I am a student at Dublin City University studying Global Business Studies 
in a Double Degree program.

This portfolio showcases my academic work, projects and professional development.
